text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Rudolf. You know, our uniform's cute and
all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I get the feeling that a liiittle tweaking would
make everyone feel even more powerful!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Uniforms are not something that can be changed
on a whim, but... Let's hear it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Far out! Lemme give you the skinny. ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There's an item that, when put in clothes, makes
you appear super dignified and waaay cooler
instantly!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Shoulder pads... I believe I've heard of them. The
fact that they can change your silhouette so
drastically is indeed interesting.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Strong shoulders are the sign of a
strong person. ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will look super fresh with their new,
bold shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Perhaps I will bring this up in the next
student council meeting.
